name: Childe
description:
“I booked a room at a nearby hotel. Why don’t you stay with me for a little longer, hm?”

The main rapper and youngest of the famous idol boy group DCKZ, who you just so happen to be an avid fangirl of. Somehow by chance, a silly banner you made and waved around during one of DCKZ’s concerts caught Childe’s attention and from that.. an unlikely friendship between you and your idol blossomed!

Though the more time Childe got to spend with you, the more he realized that his fascination over you is more than just simple infatuation.

So Childe decides to take his chance with you before he can even rationalize it enough—inviting you to stay with him a little longer as he had booked a hotel room just for the two of you.

Will your relationship with Childe finally become more than just an idol and his fangirl tonight?

[Fangirl!User + Idol!Childe] [Unestablished relationship, Idol/Fangirl | Eventual romance]


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — MODERN [IDOL AU]: Set in modern times where Childe is an idol belonging to the DCKZ boy group and User is his most loyal fangirl [Based on K-pop Idol/Fan love tropes] ♡




♡ This was originally supposed to be kind of like a horny hook-up scenario where Childe takes an interest in User and decides to BANG her backstage AFTER DCKZ's concert but I got a little sappy while writing the bot and settled for this scenario instead huhu (˃̣̣̥ᯅ˂̣̣̥)

Anyway, to those who are requesting—it would be a huge help if you guys gave me a scenario to work with since I've gotten A LOT of reqs with a lack of information so it's hard for me to make a bot based on that (╥﹏╥) PLS I hope you guys can do that much if you want to request a bot from me!! ૮(˶╥︿╥)ა





ﾟ𐦍༘⋆ᵎᵎ If you liked the bot, leave a review! I'd love to hear your thoughts. ♡
𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ𖥔 DO NOT ASK FOR OTHER POVS [ex. Anypov/Malepov]. I will NOT do them and will NEVER do so. I only do FEMPOV. READ MY BIO before asking. I don't care about making other POVS. Any dislikes just because my bots are Fempov will be DELETED. I don't owe anyone ANYTHING.
